name: The Cryo-Stasis Array
description: Thaw a specific frozen pod by aligning the defrost laser using audio frequencies.

flaws.name: Trigger Breach Alarm
flaws.flavor_text: Spoof a hull-breach to trigger the high-decibel acoustic siren.

flaws.name: Vibrate Laser Servo
flaws.flavor_text: The siren frequency vibrates the misaligned laser alignment servo into perfect lock position.

flaws.name: Fire Defrost Laser
flaws.flavor_text: With the alignment locked, fire the defrost laser to melt the master mechanical clamp.
